name: Golan v. Holder
question:
(1) Does the Progress Clause of the U.S. Constitution prohibit Congress from taking works out of the public domain?

(2) Does Section 514 of the Uruguay Round Agreements Act violate the First Amendment of the United States Constitution?
description: A case in which the Court held that Section 514 of the Uruguay Round Agreements Act, regarding copyright status of works in the public domain, does not violate the Copyright Clause or the First Amendment.
